container.label: Becoming a CNA in Connecticut
container.intro: Complete 100 hours of state-approved training, pass the Prometric competency exam, and get listed on the Connecticut DPH Nurse Aide Registry.
evidence_considered: High search volume for 'how to become a cna in ct'

variants.description: Information on how to become a CNA in CT.

variants.label: Transfer
variants.description: Transfer an active out-of-state CNA license to Connecticut.
